name: Live Migration
description: Generates the production-ready migration execution script from validated plan and clean dry-run. Requires explicit human operator authorisation before any execution — all live migrations touching PII data require sign-off. Any decline of authorisation aborts the DAG.

checks.pass: migration-plan contract available — loading ordered SQL statements
checks.fail: migration-plan contract not available — cannot generate execution script without plan

checks.pass: dry-run-results contract available — confirmed dry run is clean
checks.fail: dry-run-results contract not available — dry run gate has not been cleared

checks.prompt: Generate the production migration execution script for DBA review. The script MUST include: (1) WRITE FREEZE: exact command to set the database to read-only mode for all application users. (2) TRANSACTION WRAPPER: BEGIN statement at the top, ROLLBACK ON ERROR handler, and COMMIT only if all migration steps succeed — any single failure must trigger full rollback. (3) MIGRATION STATEMENTS: each SQL statement from the migration plan, preceded by a progress log INSERT (migration_log table), ordered by FK dependency. (4) COMMIT GUARD: final COMMIT executes only after a confirmation SELECT confirming all tables were migrated successfully. (5) POST-COMMIT: write-unfreeze command and success notification. This script will be presented to a human operator for authorisation — it must be readable and auditable. Output key: migration-execution.
checks.pass: Migration execution script generated — ready for human operator review and authorisation
checks.fail: Failed to generate complete execution script — missing required sections
